description: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Probably 11th or 12th century. Torn and damaged. Recto is difficult to read, while verso contains mostly greetings. Mentions people such as Abū l-Bishr, Abū ʿUmar, and Ibn Shaul. There are few Shauls in Goitein's name cards, all of them from 11th- to early 12th-century North Africa. AA
